# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

---
services:
  - name: users
    url: users.example.com
  - name: orders
    url: orders.example.com

routes:
  - name: users-api
    paths:
      - /users
    service: users
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          limit: 100
      - name: caching
        config:
          cache_ttl: 3600
  - name: orders-api
    paths:
      - /orders
    service: orders
    plugins:
      - name: authentication
        config:
          secret: supersecretkey
      - name: logging
        config:
          level: debug

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
  - name: caching
    enabled: true
  - name: authentication
    enabled: true
  - name: logging
    enabled: true
